your_collection_of_healthy_meals_will_ap: Your collection of healthy meals will appear here.
welcome_to_your_healthy_recipe_log_every: Welcome to your Healthy Recipe Log! Every time you cook or discover a healthy meal you love, log it here. Over time you'll build your very own collection of go-to healthy recipes that actually taste good!
e_g_boiled_oats_added_saut_ed_vegetables: e.g. Boiled oats, added sautéed vegetables...
e_g_masala_oats_grilled_paneer_salad: e.g. Masala Oats, Grilled Paneer Salad
we_eat_with_our_eyes_first_snap_a_photo_: "We eat with our eyes first! Snap a photo of your masterpiece."
how_healthy_do_you_think_it_is: How healthy do you think it is?
every_healthy_recipe_you_save_is_a_gift_: "Every healthy recipe you save is a gift to your future self. Keep building your collection!" 💚
who_would_you_recommend_this_recipe_to: Who would you recommend this recipe to?
e_g_my_sister_would_love_this_perfect_fo: e.g. My sister would love this! Perfect for a quick Monday breakfast.
one_recipe_at_a_time_you_re_building_a_h: One recipe at a time, you're building a healthier lifestyle. Keep going — your recipe collection is growing! 🧡
how_did_it_taste_and_feel: How did it taste and feel?
